---
title: "Quarto Styler"
author: "Michael Rejtig"
---

A Quarto website that leverages Observable JS (OJS) for real-time simulation of styling.


# Instructions

## summarytools table styler

Generate CSS for for your table!

1. Use the inputs to adjust the CSS styling
    i) Automatically updates and formats the CSS to be copied 
2. Copy CSS in the "Copy" tab
    i) Copy all css to clipboard using the button or
    ii) highlight and copy desired css below the button

This tool may work for other `summarytools` table outputs, but has only been tested with `dfSummary().
